message:
fix(exec): add 64KB buffer limit to lineObserverWriter

The lineObserverWriter struct was missing the buffer size limit that was
added to similar observers in other packages (ratelimit/detector.go,
wrap/wrap.go, browser/urldetect.go). This could cause unbounded memory
growth when output contains no newlines.

Added maxBufferSize (64KB) constant and buffer limit enforcement that:
- Processes oversized buffer as a partial line
- Strips trailing CR before calling onLine callback
- Clears buffer to prevent OOM

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
